title: geonoma undata subsp. venezuelana
intro: Geonoma undata subsp. venezuelana, also known as the Venezuelan geonoma, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Arecaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geonoma undata subsp. venezuelana include treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as being used as a treatment for snake bites. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
